Video.summary: Creating a living space that works for both kids and adults shouldn't mean you have to compromise on grown-up style. By using natural fibers and turning tired items into fabulous new centerpieces, Samantha Pynn transforms a living/dining room from a playroom into a glamorous living space that's sophisticated enough for a busy working mom yet playful enough for her young daughter.
Video.title: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room
Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room

Video.summary: This is the ULTIMATE Disney Descendants Mashup of our Favorite Crafts inspired by one of our favorite movies!!!! This video is nearly 45 minutes of Fabsomeness!! From our One of a Kind custom Dolls like Dizzy and Uma to our Fabulous Dollhouses like Evie's 4 Hearts studio we've got you covered! Enjoy!

Video.summary: Need another Dollhouse for your Dolls? Check out this Fabulous Craft that wont break the bank! We made a Dollar Store Dollhouse PLUS a Doll Bed, Rug and Fuzzy Doll Chair all for under 10 Bucks at the Dollar Store! This craft also makes a great gift!

Video.summary: I went to the DollarTree in search of stuff to craft with… to make… well… whatever we want! From a felt wig to a box room closet, we’re getting crafty and having fun!

Video.summary: Today at My Froggy Stuff we've got another One of a kind Custom Doll!! This time Froggy creates her favorite YouTuber TraciJHines in this Fabsome One of a Kind Celebrity Custom Doll! From custom Ombre Hair (without rerooting!!) to a DIY Graphic Tee we've checked ALL the boxes!!
